query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Crude oil today: US-Iran conflict puts pressure on global energy market | Check petrol, diesel prices in India
articles.description: Brent crude, the global oil benchmark, quoted 1.63 per cent higher at USD 84.60 per barrel. Check petrol and diesel prices in some of the major Indian cities.  | India News

articles.title: China’s Hainan cements 2030 petrol-car ban, leading nation’s EV infrastructure push
articles.description: New road map for the tropical free-trade hub highlights advancements in fleet electrification, creating a potential template for other provinces to follow.

articles.title: Asian shares fall as Mideast conflict flares up again; KOSPI hits 11-week low
articles.description: ASIAN emerging market shares hit a more than two-month low on Tuesday as oil prices jumped after the U.S. reimposed its naval blockade on Iran, while South Korean shares hit an 11-week low.

articles.title: Volatile Markets and Rising Tensions: A Financial Roller Coaster
articles.description: Global financial markets reacted to U.S.-Iran tensions, leading to volatile sessions across Asia and the U.S. Oil prices hit a one-month high, and the U.S. Federal Reserve signaled potential interest rate hikes amid looming inflation. Simultaneously, Chinese exports and imports exceeded expectations, offering some market optimism.

articles.title: Cops probing petrol station assault on YouTuber
articles.description: PETALING JAYA: Police are investigating all possible angles in the assault on local YouTube content creator and football commentator Azizurrahman Zakaria, who was attacked by two men at a petrol station near Bandar Sri Damansara on Saturday (July 11).

articles.title: US to Impose 20% Toll on Hormuz Cargo, Restarts Iran Blockade
articles.description: US President Donald Trump announced on Monday a 20% transit fee on all cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz, declaring the US the waterway's guardian. Effective Tuesday, the US will also reimpose a blockade on Iranian ports, sparking international legal pushback and causing global oil prices to surge.

articles.title: Gold recovers from two-week low ahead of US inflation
articles.description: GOLD rose on Tuesday after hitting a two-week low earlier in the session, as markets awaited key U.S. inflation data, with escalating U.S.-Iran tensions driving oil prices higher and reinforcing expectations of further Federal Reserve rate hikes.

articles.title: Tensions in the Strait: Oil Prices Soar Amid US-Iran Conflict
articles.description: Oil prices surged nearly 3% due to escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran in the Strait of Hormuz, with markets reacting to the U.S. naval blockade and attacks. Brent crude futures rose significantly, and tanker movements in the strait are at a two-month low, sparking supply concerns.

articles.title: Will E20 Petrol Damage Your Bajaj Bike? Official Compatibility Update Inside!
articles.description: Bajaj Auto has announced that all motorcycles produced in the last decade, including popular models like Pulsar and Dominar, are compatible with E20 ethanol-blended petrol. The company reassured owners that using E20 will not void their warranty, addressing prior concerns., Bike News, Times Now

articles.title: Global Market: UK bond yields hit one-month high as Middle East tensions boost rate-hike expectations
articles.description: Middle East tensions are driving oil prices higher and impacting global energy supplies. This surge in oil prices is fueling inflation concerns and influencing monetary policy expectations. Investors now anticipate the Bank of England will maintain elevated interest rates for a longer duration. Higher bond yields signal increased borrowing costs for businesses and individuals. Market sentiment faces pressure, particularly for interest-rate sensitive sectors.
